item.title: StaceyDales: Around The NFL reposteó StaceyDales @StaceyDales · 4min Georgia Tech’s star lineman Keylan Rutledge joined us @nflnetwo
item.description:
Around The NFL reposteó StaceyDales @StaceyDales · 4min Georgia Tech’s star lineman Keylan Rutledge joined us @nflnetwork …
We discussed his elite athleticism & technique, position fit guard vs center, hoops background, and the life-changing event he continues to draw from… #TheInsiders 6:48 5 8 36 18 mil

item.title:
GeorgeTsilfidis: George Tsilfidis @GeorgeTsilfidis · 14min Social media guy threw me under the bus
@robpizzola looks like the GM and
robpizzola: Rob Pizzola @robpizzola · 12min En respuesta a @GeorgeTsilfidis AI gave me my hairline from a decade ago and made me 30
item.description: Rob Pizzola @robpizzola · 12min En respuesta a @GeorgeTsilfidis AI gave me my hairline from a decade ago and made me 30 pounds heavier 1 3 203

item.title: GeorgeTsilfidis: George Tsilfidis @GeorgeTsilfidis · 10min En respuesta a @robpizzola You look like a GM who just reached on a non premi
item.description: George Tsilfidis @GeorgeTsilfidis · 10min En respuesta a @robpizzola You look like a GM who just reached on a non premium position and is high fiving with the whole room that you got your guy 1 28
